auth.verify_email_desc: Please enter the 6-digit code sent to:
auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter your email to receive a secure verification code.
auth.check_email_otp: A verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.verification_success: Account verified successfully! You can now login.
auth.email_updated: Email updated and new code sent.
auth.two_factor_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
auth.password_reset_failed: Reset failed. Check the link or try again.

profile.login_desc: Sign in to access your personal account.
profile.welcome_sub: Manage your account and track your orders from one place.
profile.start_selling_desc: Join thousands of merchants and grow your business with us today.
profile.vendor_hub_desc: Manage your products, orders, and revenue reports from one place.
profile.orders_desc: Track your orders and shipping status.
profile.addresses_desc: Manage your shipping and delivery addresses.
profile.settings_desc: Edit your personal details and security settings.
profile.vendor_status_pending_desc: Your application has been received and is being reviewed. We'll notify you once approved.
profile.vendor_status_rejected_desc: Unfortunately, your application was rejected. Contact support for details or reapply.
